scripts.build:sim: cargo build --manifest-path sim/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build:sim && npm --prefix app run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm run build:sim && npm --prefix app run build
scripts.check: npm run test:sim && npm run test:wasm && npm run build
